name: video-background-block
description: Use video as background in section.
author: Wasek Bellah

scripts.i18n: npm run i18n-pot && npm run i18n-json && npm run i18n-mo
scripts.zip: zip -r video-background-block.zip build includes languages public vendor index.php plugin.php readme.txt
scripts.bundle: gulp clean && npm run lint && npm run build && npm run i18n && find . -name '.DS_Store' -delete && npm run zip
